item.title: Inside a Sophisticated Recovery Scam Network: Evidence from a Live Investigation into Legal Services Impersonation
item.description:
A live investigation into a global recovery scam network exploiting business impersonation, fake websites, and repeat victimization across industries.

The post Inside a Sophisticated Recovery Scam Network: Evidence from a Live Investigation into Legal Services Impersonation appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: When Expectations Meet Reality: The Anatomy of Cyber Incidents Affecting OT Organizations
item.description:
Real world incident response experience shows that many attacks against OT centric organizations unfold differently than expected. There are several key reasons why reality diverges from initial assumptions, and understanding these gaps offers critical lessons for strengthening operational resilience.

The post When Expectations Meet Reality: The Anatomy of Cyber Incidents Affecting OT Organizations appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: Incident Response in Crypto: Gaps between Perception and Best Practice
item.description:
Join Sygnia for a webinar on today’s crypto threat landscape. Learn how to prevent, detect, and respond to crypto attacks with insights from the Bybit exchange breach.

The post Incident Response in Crypto: Gaps between Perception and Best Practice appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: What 2025’s Major Cyber Incidents Taught Executives About Incident Response Readiness
item.description:
Discover what Threat Detection, Investigation & Response (TDIR) means for modern enterprises, including frameworks, risks, and executive-level decision insights.

The post What 2025’s Major Cyber Incidents Taught Executives About Incident Response Readiness appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: Incident Response in the AI Threat Era: What Boards Must Re-Evaluate in 2026
item.description:
Explore how AI-driven cyber threats are reshaping board-level risk decisions and what executives must re-evaluate for incident response in 2026.

The post Incident Response in the AI Threat Era: What Boards Must Re-Evaluate in 2026 appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: Exfiltration in Plain Sight: SafePay’s OneDrive Play
item.description:
Discover how SafePay’s rapid, high-pressure ransomware campaigns unfold, and what Sygnia learned while investigating a real-world double extortion attack that put a global organization to the test.

The post Exfiltration in Plain Sight: SafePay’s OneDrive Play appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: One Commit Away from Theft: When Supply Chain Attacks Hit the Crypto Ecosystem
item.description:
Explore patterns observed across real-world crypto incidents and controlled adversary exercises, along with a containment-first defense roadmap built on lessons learned from those cases.

The post One Commit Away from Theft: When Supply Chain Attacks Hit the Crypto Ecosystem appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: Lessons from the Stryker Incident
item.description:
The Stryker incident demonstrates how attackers can leverage Microsoft Entra ID and Intune as destructive control planes, wiping devices and disrupting operations without deploying malware. This advisory outlines the key tactics observed and provides practical steps to reduce risk and strengthen resilience.

The post Lessons from the Stryker Incident appeared first on Sygnia.

item.title: Why Incident Response Retainers Fail in a Real Crisis
item.description:
Explore why incident response retainers fall short during live breaches, and what distinguishes a provider that can respond effectively when a breach puts your organization under real pressure.

The post Why Incident Response Retainers Fail in a Real Crisis appeared first on Sygnia.
